ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the product was created */,
  "sub_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sub-category of the product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the product */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit (SKU) of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Country of origin of the product */,
  "composition" TEXT /* Material composition of the product */,
  "full_price" TEXT /* Full price of the product */,
  "sale_price" TEXT /* Sale price of the product */,
  "discount_percent" TEXT /* Discount percentage of the product */,
  "remaining_sizes" TEXT /* Remaining sizes of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "stock_status" TEXT /* Stock status of the product */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the seller of the product */,
  "product_rating" TEXT /* Average rating of the product */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_sub_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("sub_category_id") REFERENCES sub_categories ("sub_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sub_categories" (
  "sub_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sub-category */,
  "sub_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the sub-category */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the main category of the sub-category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sub-category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sub_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sub_categories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each main category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the main category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the main category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the brand */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the size belongs to */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the size remaining in stock */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Description of the size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the image belongs to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "alt_text" TEXT /* Alternative text for the image */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., product, lifestyle, detail) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, customer) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "sellers" (
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seller */,
  "seller_name" TEXT /* Full name of the seller */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the seller */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the seller */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the seller */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the seller */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seller_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address of the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in the order item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product at the time of order */,
  "discount_amount" TEXT /* Discount amount applied to the order item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in the inventory */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* Date the inventory was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping entry */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being shipped */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping (e.g., ground, air) */,
  "shipping_cost" TEXT /* Cost of shipping */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated date of delivery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
